case_title: MARTINEZ, DAVID VS DEEPE, BARBARA J.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEEPE, BARBARA J. $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DEEPE, BARBARA J. HEARING SET FOR JUN-26-2000 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-26-2000, GRANTED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO BARBARA J.DEEPE RETURNED UNCLAIMED;
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DEEPE, BARBARA J. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DEEPE, BARBARA J.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT DEEPE, BARBARA J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-03-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-20-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
